name: Update Existing Skill
about: Report outdated content, broken code, or suggest improvements
title: "[Update] discipline/skill-name — brief description"
labels: skill-update
assignees: ''
---

## Target Skill

**Skill path**: `skills/XX-discipline/skill-name/SKILL.md`

---

## Issue Type

- [ ] Dependency version outdated (API changed)
- [ ] Code does not execute (error)
- [ ] Professional content error
- [ ] External link broken
- [ ] Add new feature / tool
- [ ] Other:

---

## Details

**Current behavior**:
> Describe the problem.

**Expected behavior**:
> How it should be corrected.

**Version info**:
> Affected versions (e.g. works on `pymc==4.x`, breaks on `pymc>=5.0`).

---

## Will you submit a fix PR?

- [ ] Yes, within [ ] days
- [ ] No, reporting only

---

paste full error message here
